description: Targeted outreach planning for a SPECIFIC person or organization. Builds multi-touch engagement strategies. Requires strategy.md as input. NOT for general competitor research or broad audience analysis.

cases.query: How do I approach the VP of Engineering at Stripe? I need a targeted outreach plan to get a meeting with them.
Outreach to Guillermo Rauch. I want a multi-touch plan to get Vercel's CEO to notice my tool.
Target the DevRel team at Cloudflare. Build me an engagement strategy to get them talking about us.
Engage the engineering lead at Figma. What's the best angle to get their attention and start a conversation?
How do I approach Jason Warner? He was CTO at GitHub and I think our tool solves a problem he's talked about publicly.
Go deeper on Shopify's platform team. I want a specific plan to get our CLI tool in front of their build engineers.
Refine my outreach plan for the CTO at Linear. I have strategy.md but need a concrete approach for this specific person.
Target YC partners. Build me a multi-touch engagement plan to get forbotsake noticed by the YC community.
Approach the head of developer experience at Netlify. I want to turn them into an early champion for our tool.
Sharpen my outreach for Supabase's team. They're active on Twitter and I think there's an angle through their open source philosophy.
I want a targeted plan to engage Hacker News moderator dang. What's the right way to build rapport before posting?
Go deeper on this. My content plan mentions targeting DevOps influencers but I need specific names and approach strategies.
What are my competitors doing? Show me a full landscape of developer deployment tools and their marketing approaches.
Competitor analysis. What messaging angles are Vercel and Netlify using on social media?
Find the messaging whitespace in the CI/CD tool market. What are competitors missing?
Who is my audience? Build me persona profiles for infrastructure engineers at mid-size startups.
Where does my ideal customer hang out online? I need community research, not targeted outreach.
ICP deep dive. What are the pain points and buying triggers for platform engineering leads?
Write a Twitter thread aimed at engineering managers. I know the audience, I just need the content written.
How should I market this? I need a full go-to-market strategy before targeting anyone specific.
Review my strategy. Challenge my positioning and channel choices before I start doing outreach.
Do marketing for this project end to end. Run the full pipeline automatically.
